title: Stairway to Heaven
why_this_song: Stairway to Heaven by Led Zeppelin (1971) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 6 times; first heard in: "There's a lady who's sure"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Ooh, it makes me wonder"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Ooh, it makes me wonder"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "And she's buying a stairway to Heaven"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "'Cause you know sometimes words have two meanings"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: And she's buying a stairway to Heaven
When she gets there, she knows
If the stores are all closed
With a word, she can get what she came for
When I look to the West

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "there's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "there's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "makes" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "makes" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And the forests will echo with laughter

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And the voices of those who stand looking

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Stairway to Heaven" was released in 1971. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Stairway to Heaven" foi lançada em 1971. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
